# GVK EduTech - AI Visibility File

> GVK EduTech is a leading study abroad consultancy in Hyderabad, India, specializing in helping Indian students pursue MBBS and Masters degrees at top universities worldwide. With 5000+ students placed in medical universities globally, we provide expert guidance for MBBS abroad programs.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://gvkedutech.com/) - GVK EduTech official website
- [About Us](https://gvkedutech.com/about) - Company overview
- [Contact Us](https://gvkedutech.com/contact) - Get in touch
- [Apply Now](https://gvkedutech.com/apply) - Start your application
- [Partner Universities](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities) - Browse all partner universities
- [MBBS Abroad](https://gvkedutech.com/mbbs) - MBBS programs worldwide
- [Masters Abroad](https://gvkedutech.com/masters) - Masters programs worldwide

## Services & Info Pages
- [Services](https://gvkedutech.com/services) - Our consultancy services
- [Gallery](https://gvkedutech.com/gallery) - Photo gallery

- [Branches](https://gvkedutech.com/branches) - All branch locations

## MBBS Country Pages
- [MBBS in Russia](https://gvkedutech.com/mbbs/russia) - NMC-approved medical universities in Russia
- [MBBS in Georgia](https://gvkedutech.com/mbbs/georgia) - Affordable medical education in Georgia
- [MBBS in Kyrgyzstan](https://gvkedutech.com/mbbs/kyrgyzstan) - Low-cost MBBS programs in Kyrgyzstan
- [MBBS in Kazakhstan](https://gvkedutech.com/mbbs/kazakhstan) - Top medical universities in Kazakhstan
- [MBBS in Nepal](https://gvkedutech.com/mbbs/nepal) - Budget-friendly option in Nepal
- [MBBS in Uzbekistan](https://gvkedutech.com/mbbs/uzbekistan) - Top medical colleges in Uzbekistan
- [MBBS in Vietnam](https://gvkedutech.com/mbbs/vietnam) - Asian medical destination in Vietnam

## Masters Country Pages
- [Masters in USA](https://gvkedutech.com/masters/usa) - Top universities, STEM OPT
- [Masters in UK](https://gvkedutech.com/masters/uk) - World-class education, 1-year programs
- [Masters in Australia](https://gvkedutech.com/masters/australia) - Post-study work visa
- [Masters in Canada](https://gvkedutech.com/masters/canada) - PGWP and PR pathway
- [Masters in Germany](https://gvkedutech.com/masters/germany) - Free tuition available
- [Masters in Ireland](https://gvkedutech.com/masters/ireland) - Global career opportunities
- [Masters in New Zealand](https://gvkedutech.com/masters/newzealand) - Work & study option
- [Masters in Europe](https://gvkedutech.com/masters/europe) - Affordable education in Europe

## Partner Universities - MBBS (Uzbekistan)
- [Samarkand State Medical University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/samarkand-state-medical-university) - MBBS in Samarkand, Uzbekistan
- [Bukhara State Medical Institute](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/bukhara-state-medical-institute) - NMC approved MBBS in Bukhara
- [Andijan State Medical Institute](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/andijan-state-medical-institute) - NMC approved MBBS in Andijan
- [Tashkent Medical Academy](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/tashkent-medical-academy) - MBBS in Tashkent, Uzbekistan

## Partner Universities - MBBS (Russia)
- [Perm State Medical University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/perm-state-medical-university) - NMC approved, 100+ years legacy, affordable MBBS in Russia
- [Orenburg State Medical University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/orenburg-state-medical-university) - NMC approved, English medium, low-cost MBBS in Orenburg, Russia

## Partner Universities - MBBS (Georgia)
- [Tbilisi State Medical University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/tbilisi-state-medical-university) - NMC approved, English medium MBBS in Georgia
- [Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/batumi-shota-rustaveli-state-university) - Affordable MBBS in Georgia

## Partner Universities - Masters (UK)

- [University of Birmingham](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-birmingham) - Russell Group university

- [University of Liverpool](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-liverpool) - Russell Group, World Top 170
- [Teesside University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/teesside-university) - Affordable fees, modern facilities
- [University of Nottingham](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-nottingham) - Russell Group, Top 100 World Ranking
- [University of Sheffield](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-sheffield) - Russell Group, QS Top 100, research-intensive
- [University of York](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-york) - Russell Group, QS Top 150, research-led UK university
- [University of Southampton](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-southampton) - Russell Group, World Top 100, engineering & oceanography

## Study Destinations

### MBBS Countries
- Russia - NMC-approved medical universities
- Georgia - Affordable medical education
- Kyrgyzstan - Low-cost MBBS programs
- Kazakhstan - Top medical universities
- Nepal - Budget-friendly option
- Uzbekistan - Top medical colleges
- Vietnam - Asian medical destination

### Masters Countries
- USA - Top universities, STEM OPT
- UK - World-class education, 1-year programs
- Australia - Post-study work visa
- Canada - PGWP and PR pathway
- Germany - Free tuition available
- Ireland - Global career opportunities
- New Zealand - Work & study option
- Europe - Affordable education

## Services
- MBBS Abroad Consultancy
- Masters Abroad Programs
- University Selection & Admission
- Visa Assistance
- Pre-Departure Briefings
- Post-Departure Support
